request.description:
### List orders

### Responses

#### Response: `200` - Array of `OrderResource`
```json
{
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "customer_id": 1,
            "shop_id": 1,
            "shop": {
                "id": 1,
                "shop_name": "Example Name",
                "shop_description": "An example description.",
                "created_at": "",
                "updated_at": ""
            },
            "address_id": 1,
            "wallet_id": "",
            "payment_method": "wallet",
            "status": "pending",
            "batch_ref": "",
            "total_amount": "500.00",
            "cancel_reason": [],
            "cancel_reason_notes": "",
            "shipped_at": "",
            "delivered_at": "",
            "cancel_at": "",
            "completed_at": "",
            "created_at": "",
            "updated_at": "",
            "items": [
                {
                    "id": 1,
                    "order_id": 1,
                    "product_id": "",
                    "product_name": "string",
                    "unit_price": "500.00",
                    "quantity": 2,
                    "subtotal": "500.00",
                    "created_at": "",
                    "updated_at": ""
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}
```

#### Response: `401` - UNAUTHENTICATED Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "UNAUTHENTICATED",
    "exception_type": "AuthenticationException",
    "message": "Unauthenticated."
}
```


### Deactivate user

JWT is stateless — there are no stored tokens to revoke.
The is_active flag is checked on every request by the
EnsureUserIsActive middleware, so the user is effectively
locked out immediately.

### Responses

#### Response: `204` - No content
#### Response: `404` - NOT_FOUND Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "NOT_FOUND",
    "exception_type": "ModelNotFoundException",
    "message": "Resource not found."
}
```

#### Response: `401` - UNAUTHENTICATED Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "UNAUTHENTICATED",
    "exception_type": "AuthenticationException",
    "message": "Unauthenticated."
}
```

### Register user

### Responses

#### Response: `201` - 
```json
{
    "message": "string",

        "id": 1,
        "name": "Example Name",
        "email": "customer@example.com",
        "email_verified_at": "customer@example.com",
        "role": "customer",
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "",
        "updated_at": ""
    },
    "authorization": {
        "access_token": [],
        "token_type": "string",
        "expires_in": "string"
    }
}
```

```json
{
    "error_code": "INTERNAL_ERROR",

```
